billing.pageIntro: View token usage, subscription plans, and pay-as-you-go packs. Subscribe or buy packs when trial credits run out.
billing.quotaSubtitle: For AI product titles and descriptions. Upgrade or buy packs below when you need more.
billing.planBenefitsFootnote: Packs never expire · Subscription refreshes each period
billing.choosePlanSubtitle: Upgrade anytime. Monthly or annual billing, checkout secured by Shopify.
billing.trustCheckout: Subscriptions and packs are billed through Shopify in your store currency.
billing.sectionPacksHint: Purchased tokens never expire and stack with your subscription balance.
billing.lowBalanceWarning: Insufficient tokens. Please subscribe or purchase a token pack on the plans page.
billing.planBenefits: Packs never expire · Subscription refreshes each period · Buy extra packs anytime
billing.choosePlanTitle: Choose the plan that fits you

chat.initialAssistantMessage:
Hello, I am AI Assistant.

I currently support:
1. Store performance analysis and diagnostic suggestions
2. Ads and logistics authorization guidance
3. Operation copywriting and promotion suggestions
4. Common business Q&A
5. Picture translation (upload images and translate text in them)
6. Product copy (provide product ID for tool-based generation, or click the quick prompt and fill in the card, or open the Product copy page)

You can:
• Click the top "Picture translation" quick action to create a translation task
• Use multi-language auto detection
• Keep the original image layout

Tell me your goal directly.
chat.intro: Ask directly for store insights, ads/logistics authorization guidance, and operation suggestions.
chat.tipSingleQuestion: Ask one question at a time for better accuracy.
chat.tipScenario: Describe your scenario directly, such as customer acquisition or repeat purchase growth.
chat.tipAction: When you need actions, include clear goals and constraints.
chat.tipNewChat: The model keeps this page conversation context. Click New chat to reset.
chat.sendFailed: Send failed. Please try again later.
chat.requestFailed: Request failed ({{status}}). Please try again later.
chat.invalidReply: No valid response received. Please retry.
chat.assistantOpenGenerateCard: I have opened the product copy form. Please search and select a product (or manually enter product ID in Advanced), choose the target language, and the system will generate title and description from Shopify product data.
chat.assistantOpenTranslationCard: The translation task card is open. Fill in the target language, item limit per module, and select modules (products, collections, pages, articles, etc.), then submit to start the translation task.
chat.assistantOpenPictureTranslateCard: Picture translation card is open. Upload an image or paste an image URL, choose languages, then submit.
chat.translationSubmittedWithId: Translation task submitted (Task ID: {{jobId}}). Please go to Translation tasks page to check JSON Runtime progress.
chat.translationSubmitted: Translation task submitted. Please go to Translation tasks page to check progress.
chat.pictureTranslateCompleted:
Picture translation completed.

Translated image below 👇

imageStudio.pageSubtitle: Generate product images or translate picture text on one page; history is saved together
imageStudio.historyHint: Generation and translation history merged by time; click to switch tab and preview
imageStudio.historyEmpty: No activity yet — generate or translate to see items here

pictureTranslate.title: Picture translation
pictureTranslate.subtitle: Upload an image and choose translation languages
pictureTranslate.productEmpty: No matching products found, try another keyword
pictureTranslate.productImageEmpty: No available images for this product
pictureTranslate.validationImageRequired: Please upload an image or input an image URL
pictureTranslate.validationInvalidFileType: Only png, jpg, jpeg images are supported
pictureTranslate.readFileFailed: Failed to read image, please retry
pictureTranslate.pageSubtitle: Translate text in images while preserving original layout
pictureTranslate.pageFootnote: Upload, URL, or product image supported. Volcano or Aidge is chosen automatically by language.
pictureTranslate.empty: Upload an image to start translation
pictureTranslate.historyHint: History persists when you return; click an entry to preview on the right

imageGeneration.pageSubtitle: Describe the scene — AI Assistant will craft a drawing prompt and generate the image
imageGeneration.descriptionHint: Describe the product, setting, and style in plain language — e.g. summer running shoes on grass, bright sunlight, e-commerce hero shot
imageGeneration.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the product image you want…
imageGeneration.validationDescriptionMin: Description must be at least 4 characters
imageGeneration.generatingAsync: Generating image in the background. It will appear here when ready; check Recent generations below.
imageGeneration.pollTimeout: Generation is taking longer than expected. Check Recent generations later or retry.
imageGeneration.empty: No image yet — adjust the description and try again
imageGeneration.emptyBeforeSubmit: Enter a scene description, then click Generate image
imageGeneration.historyHint: History persists when you return to this page; click a pending item to keep waiting
imageGeneration.pageFootnote: Images are generated asynchronously and stored in the cloud. Return to this page to view Recent generations; they are not written to Shopify automatically.

generate.intro: Generate product titles and marketing copy from Shopify product data in your current store. Select a product first; target language defaults to store primary language and can be changed from the dropdown.
generate.formCardSubtitle: Select a product and target language, then generate
generate.pageFootnote: Generation uses tokens. Preview and edit title and description on the right before saving to Shopify.
generate.fallbackLocalesHint: Using built-in locale list. Grant read_locales scope and reinstall app to sync enabled Shopify locales.
generate.emptyResult: Please select a product and generate copy.
generate.confirmSaveDesc: Current edited title and description will be written back to this product and overwrite product copy in store.
generate.validationSelectProductId: Please select a product or enter product ID
generate.validationLocalesLoading: Language list is loading. Please wait.
generate.copyFailed: Copy failed. Check browser permission or copy manually.

credentials.suggestionIntro: Enter the feature you want assistant to add.
credentials.suggestionModalHint: Describe the feature you want assistant to support.
credentials.adsAuthDesc: After authorizing ad platforms, AI can analyze channel performance such as ROAS, conversion, and channel contribution.
credentials.logisticsAuthDesc: After authorizing logistics platforms, AI can analyze fulfillment with delivery time, shipment exception, and sign-off metrics.
credentials.oauthPending: {{provider}} {{category}} authorization flow is not connected yet (OAuth)
credentials.sfHint: SF Express usually uses API credentials instead of OAuth redirect authorization. Fill customer code and check word; monthly account is optional.
credentials.fedexHint: FedEx uses API credentials. Fill API Key, Secret Key, and Account Number; Meter Number is optional.
credentials.googleRequireAll: Please complete Google Ads authorization details
credentials.tiktokRequireAll: Please complete TikTok Ads authorization details
credentials.microsoftRequireAll: Please complete Microsoft Ads authorization details
credentials.sfRequireAll: Please provide SF customer code and check word
credentials.fedexRequireAll: Please provide FedEx API Key, Secret Key, and Account Number
credentials.googleSaveFail: Failed to save Google Ads authorization. Try again later.
credentials.tiktokSaveFail: Failed to save TikTok Ads authorization. Try again later.
credentials.microsoftSaveFail: Failed to save Microsoft Ads authorization. Try again later.
credentials.sfSaveFail: Failed to save SF Express configuration. Try again later.
credentials.fedexSaveFail: Failed to save FedEx authorization. Try again later.
credentials.suggestionSubmitOk: Submitted successfully. Thanks for your suggestion.
credentials.suggestionSubmitCatch: Failed to submit suggestion. Try again later.
credentials.googleTipClientId: OAuth Client ID: get it from Google Cloud Console OAuth credentials page.
credentials.googleTipClientSecret: OAuth Client Secret: get it from the same credential entry as Client ID.
credentials.googleTipDeveloperToken: Developer Token: apply/view in Google Ads API Center.
credentials.googleTipCustomerId: Customer ID: Google Ads account ID. Numeric format without dashes is recommended.
credentials.tiktokTipAppId: App ID: create app in TikTok for Business developer portal.
credentials.tiktokTipAppSecret: App Secret: from the same app settings page as App ID.
credentials.tiktokTipAdvertiserId: Advertiser ID: check in TikTok Ads advertiser account info page.
credentials.microsoftTipClientId: Client ID: from App registrations in Azure Portal.
credentials.microsoftTipClientSecret: Client Secret: create/get from Certificates & secrets of the same app.
credentials.microsoftTipDeveloperToken: Developer Token: get from Microsoft Advertising portal/API settings.
credentials.microsoftTipCustomerId: Customer ID: Microsoft Advertising account ID.
credentials.sfTipCustomerCode: Customer Code: get from SF open platform/e-waybill API onboarding documents.
credentials.sfTipCheckWord: Check Word: provided by SF open platform with customer code.
credentials.sfTipMonthly: Monthly account: from SF monthly billing account profile (optional).
credentials.sfTipSupport: If values are unclear, contact SF business/technical support for activation parameters.
credentials.fedexTipApiKey: API Key: generated after creating project in FedEx Developer Portal.
credentials.fedexTipSecret: Secret Key: generated on the same page as API Key.
credentials.fedexTipAccount: Account Number: from FedEx account profile.
credentials.fedexTipMeter: Meter Number: from historical FedEx Web Services onboarding data (optional).

additional.pageIntro: Store health diagnostics from the last 7 days of orders, inventory, and conversion data. See traffic and ads guidance in the aside.
additional.diagSalesHealthy: Sales trend is healthy: sales in last 7 days are growing compared to previous 7 days.
additional.diagSalesRisk: Sales trend is weak: sales in last 7 days declined. Check traffic and campaigns.
additional.diagSalesWatch: Sales trend is stable: continue observing channel spend and campaign conversion.
additional.diagInventoryRisk: Inventory risk is high: out-of-stock ratio is high, prioritize replenishment for fast-moving SKUs.
additional.diagInventoryWatch: Inventory needs attention: low-stock SKU ratio is high, schedule replenishment.
additional.diagInventoryHealthy: Inventory is healthy overall: out-of-stock risk is controllable.
additional.diagConversionRisk: Conversion is low: check product pages, shipping strategy, and checkout flow.
additional.diagRefundRisk: Refund rate is high: check product copy, quality, and fulfillment timing.
additional.clickInsight: Click health: ad click sources (Meta/Google/TikTok) are not connected. Complete ad authorization before diagnosing CTR and ROAS.
additional.fallbackConversion: Abandoned checkout or order data is temporarily unavailable
additional.fallbackDiagScopes: Check app scopes (read_orders/read_products) and current staff permissions, then retry.

translation.pageIntro: Create JSON Runtime translation jobs and monitor progress. Choose target locale and resource types, then submit. Use the panel on the right for task list and runtime status.
translation.validationResourceTypes: Please select at least one resource type
translation.createFailedRetry: Failed to create task. Please try again later.

productSelector.empty: No matching products found, try another keyword

translationRuntime.validationTargetExample: Please enter target locale, e.g. fr, ja, en
translationRuntime.validationModule: Please select at least one translation module
translationRuntime.createTaskDesc: This writes a JSON Runtime task into Cosmos, and AgentTask handles execution. Confirm locale and modules before submitting.
translationRuntime.openTaskPage: Open translation task page to view progress
translationRuntime.loadFailedRetry: Load failed, please try again later
translationRuntime.fileEmptyOrNoBlobContent: (File is empty or Blob has no content yet)
translationRuntime.selectTaskHint: Select a task from the list above
translationRuntime.previewTruncatedDownloadHint: Preview is truncated; download full content from storage.
translationRuntime.serviceErrorRetry: Network or service error, please try again later
translationRuntime.listLoadFailedRetry: Failed to load task list, please try again later
translationRuntime.noPercentReason: Unable to compute percentage: neither Redis meta nor Cosmos metrics has entry totals (totalCountThisBlob / totalCount), and chunk totals (runtimeChunksTotal) are also missing.
translationRuntime.panelIntro: Task list comes from Cosmos in this app (same table as creation), and refreshes quietly every {{listSec}}s when visible. Task details are forwarded to Java AgentTask by default (translate/v3/jsonRuntimeTaskDetail); if JSON_RUNTIME_TASK_DETAIL_SOURCE=local is set, Spark aggregates Cosmos/Redis/Blob locally. Auto-refresh starts after selecting a task (about every {{detailSec}}s) with countdown; hidden pages pause countdown and requests.
translationRuntime.currentShopTasksHeading: JSON Runtime tasks for current shop
translationRuntime.noTaskRecords: No tasks found in Cosmos (translation_jobs) for this shop with taskType=spark (or legacy json-runtime).
translationRuntime.selectTaskToView: Select a task above to view runtime progress and Blob info.
translationRuntime.noDataEmptyResponse: No data (request succeeded but response is empty).
translationRuntime.initFetchExplain: This section tracks initial Shopify fetching: accumulated count increases per module; 'Initial total count' is sum of translatable rows captured by modules (subject to module limits). Its denominator differs from below entry progress, which uses runtime parsed translatable paths from merged JSON (including nested expansion), usually larger. It auto-refreshes with details every {{sec}}s.
translationRuntime.initTotalCountLabel: Initial total count (!= runtime path count)
translationRuntime.failuresHeading: Failure details (Redis failMap · Report · Blob chunks/failed.json)
translationRuntime.largeReportBlobHint: Current report Blob is large (>512KB), failures are not inlined. Download from Report Blob below or enable preview to view full JSON.
translationRuntime.failedJsonLargeHint: chunks/failed.json is larger than 512KB and not returned inline; open tasks/.../chunks/failed.json under Blob input directory.
translationRuntime.noFailureDetailHint: No failure details. If task failed and Blob exists, refresh details and deploy backend version that includes chunks/failed.json extra fields.
translationRuntime.expandFailedJsonAll: Expand full Blob chunks/failed.json entries ({{count}} items with source text)
translationRuntime.reportBlobDesc: Generated by LLM after translation is completed. Stored with chunk files under chunks/. Click below to fetch Blob preview and render in modal.
translationRuntime.qualityBlobDesc: Samples successful source/translation paths and asks LLM to score overall quality and provide poor examples (independent from translation-report.md).
translationRuntime.previewServerTruncatedHint: Preview is truncated by server-side size limit; download full Blob from storage console.
translationRuntime.cosmosStatusSavePending: Translation complete, writing back to Shopify
